name: Ghost
description:
⚠ TW: Self-harm, heavy themes ⚠

!!This story contains themes of self-harm and mental struggles. If these topics make you uncomfortable or could be triggering for you, please read with caution or skip this story.

Your well-being matters. If you’re struggling, please reach out to someone you trust. You are not alone. ❤️!!
creator: rxttencxoprse0
